page_metadata.bioconda__summary: GRIDSS: the Genomic Rearrangement IDentification Software Suite
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A high-speed next-gen sequencing structural variation caller. it calls variants based on alignment-guided positional de bruijn graph breakpoint assembly, split read, and read pair evidence.
